mnemonics: CIAO for CIE: Continuous Internal Auditing & Oversight. Think of it as a friendly, ongoing check-in (CIAO!) with your data security to ensure privacy.
keyPoints: It is an ongoing, cyclical process, not a one-time event.
It involves regular audits and assessments of security controls and data handling practices.
Its goal is to proactively identify and address vulnerabilities and compliance gaps.
commonMistakes: Treating it as a periodic or annual activity rather than a continuous process.
Focusing only on technical controls and ignoring employee behavior and process flaws.
Failing to document the evaluation process and findings for accountability and improvement.
